_comment.name: AFFICHEUR_LIN DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: EMF_DGT_UDS, EMF_DGT_UDS_GP. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B1575.name: Unexpected restarting of the multifunction touch screen ECU

B1576.name: Secure configuration of the multifunction touch screen

U1F18.name: Touch screen not communicating on the multimedia CAN

U1F3E.name: Absence of communication with the telematic unit

U1FA0.name: LVDS response time incorrect  ( LVDS : Low Voltage Differential Signalling )
